mapper.sql: SELECT e.id, e.device_unit_id AS deviceUnitId, e.unit_code, e.unit_name, e.equipment_code, e.equipment_name, e.maintainer_name, e.equipment_category, e.equipment_importance, e.repair_strategy, e.overhaul_team, e.act_team, e.creator_id, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM equipment e
mapper.select:
AND e.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND e.device_unit_id = #{deviceUnitId} AND e.equipment_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentCode}, '%') AND e.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentName}, '%') AND e.equipment_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentCategory}, '%') AND e.equipment_importance LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentImportance}, '%') AND e.repair_strategy LIKE CONCAT('%', #{repairStrategy}, '%') AND e.overhaul_team LIKE CONCAT('%', #{overhaulTeam}, '%') AND e.act_team LIKE CONCAT('%', #{actTeam}, '%')
ORDER BY e.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO equipment
device_unit_id, unit_code, unit_name, equipment_code, equipment_name, maintainer_name, equipment_category, equipment_importance, repair_strategy, overhaul_team, act_team, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{deviceUnitId}, #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{equipmentCode}, #{equipmentName}, #{maintainerName}, #{equipmentCategory}, #{equipmentImportance}, #{repairStrategy}, #{overhaulTeam}, #{actTeam}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
INNER JOIN device_unit du ON e.device_unit_id = du.id INNER JOIN production_line pl ON du.production_line_id = pl.id
pl.line_code = #{lineCode} AND e.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND e.equipment_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentCode}, '%') AND e.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentName}, '%') AND e.equipment_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentCategory}, '%') AND e.equipment_importance LIKE CONCAT('%', #{equipmentImportance}, '%') AND e.repair_strategy LIKE CONCAT('%', #{repairStrategy}, '%') AND e.overhaul_team LIKE CONCAT('%', #{overhaulTeam}, '%') AND e.act_team LIKE CONCAT('%', #{actTeam}, '%')
ORDER BY e.id DESC
